title: Using Make/Zapier/integrations to get data into Monday – what's still painful?
excerpt: I’m a software founder working on workflow and integration tooling for small teams. I’m assuming most of you use integration platforms like Make, Zapier, or native integrations to pull data from other systems into Monday…

posts.author: iirorahkonen (Iiro Rahkonen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a software founder working on workflow and integration tooling for small teams. I’m assuming most of you use integration platforms like Make, Zapier, or native integrations to pull data from other systems into Monday.

Curious what you still can’t do, or what’s more painful than it should be:

  • Data you wanted to bring in but couldn’t figure out how?

  • Setups that feel fragile or break unexpectedly?

  • Things that should be simple but aren’t?

I’m building in this space and want to learn from real limitations before writing code. Not selling anything – just trying to understand where the gaps are.
